format.raw: Dec 9 19:47:19 IP Dec 09 19:49:36 hostname CEF:0|JATP|Cortex|3.6.0.1444|email|TROJAN.$ATTACK_NAME|$SEVERITY|externalId=$CONN_ID eventId=14068 lastActivityTime=2016-05-10 02:49:36:00 src=$SRC_IP dst=$DST_IP srcHostname= dstHostname= srcUsername= dstUsername= mailtoSrcEmailId=src@abc.com dstEmailId=mailto:test1@abc.com,mailto:test2@abc.com fileHash=$FILE_HASH fileType=PE32 executable startTime=2016-05-10

xml.raw:
<Policy>
  <Parser parser_key="{@parser_key}" type="1" separator="CEF" version="0" arr_length="-1">
    <Field position="0"  name="device_version" />
    <Field position="1"  name="severity" />
    <Field position="2"  name="device_product" />
    <Field position="3"  name="event_id" />
    <Field position="4"  name="attack_nm" />
    <Field position="5"  name="src" />
    <Field position="6"  name="external_id" />
    <Field position="7"  name="file_hash" />
    <Field position="8"  name="cef_version" />
    <Field position="9"  name="signature_id" />
    <Field position="10" name="dst_email_id" />
    <Field position="11" name="start_time" />
    <Field position="12" name="device_vendor" />
    <Field position="13" name="last_activity_time" />
    <Field position="14" name="mailto_src_email_id" />
    <Field position="15" name="file_type" />
    <Field position="16" name="vendor"         convert_tag="[[@set('junipernetworks')]]" />
    <Field position="17" name="model"          convert_tag="[[@set('jatpcortex')]]" />
    <Field position="18" name="logtype"        convert_tag="[[@set('security')]]" />
    <Field position="19" name="parser_version"  convert_tag="[[@set('v2')]]" />
    <Field position="20" name="original_log"   convert_tag="[[@originalLog()]]" />
    <Field position="21" name="parser_info"    convert_tag="[[@set('[Juniper]_jatp_security_v2_cef')]]" />
    <Field position="22" name="eqp_type"       convert_tag="[[@set('apt')]]" />
  </Parser>
</Policy>
